headline: BofA Rolls Out AI Meeting Journey to 15,000 Advisors — 1,500 Beta Users, Salesforce + Zoom Integration
summary: Bank of America has deployed its AI-Powered Meeting Journey across 15,000 Merrill Wealth Management and Private Bank employees, automating three workflow stages: meeting preparation (reducing ~45 minutes of manual prep to minutes), real-time meeting summarisation via Zoom (with client consent), and post-meeting follow-up task generation condensed to two clicks (BofA Newsroom, March 26, 2026). Built in collaboration with Salesforce Financial Services Cloud and Zoom, the tool achieved the fastest adoption rate of any BofA tool rollout, with 1,500+ advisors using it during beta (WealthManagement.com). COO Patricio Diaz stated the tool 'empowers advisors to shift capacity toward activities that drive business growth.' The system also includes a 'Plan My Day' capability that surfaces upcoming meetings, client milestones, and task priorities, plus a conversational CRM assistant for natural-language queries across client data (American Banker).
the_so_what: BofA is the first wirehouse to ship an integrated AI meeting workflow — prep, transcription, and follow-up — as default infrastructure to its full advisor base, while Morgan Stanley's Debrief focuses on post-meeting notes only and JPMorgan's Connect Coach remains in phased rollout. The Salesforce + Zoom integration choice signals BofA is building on enterprise platforms rather than proprietary stacks, a model that scales faster but creates vendor dependency. Any wealth firm still piloting standalone meeting AI tools is now competing against a wirehouse where 15,000 advisors have end-to-end automation as baseline infrastructure.

key_stat.label: employees across Merrill and Private Bank with AI Meeting Journey in production (BofA press release, March 2026)

capability_evidence.evidence: AI-Powered Meeting Journey deployed across all Merrill Wealth Management and Private Bank employees. 1,500+ advisors used it during beta — fastest adoption rate of any BofA tool. Built on Salesforce Financial Services Cloud + Zoom.
capability_evidence.metric: 15,000 employees; 1,500+ beta users; ~45 min prep time reduced to minutes

people: Shimna Sameer — Head of Products, Solutions & Platforms, BofA Private Bank
Inez Louzonis — MD, Head of Platforms & Capabilities, Merrill
Paula Hanson — Private Bank Platforms Executive

landscape_context.peer_comparison: Morgan Stanley Debrief (post-meeting notes, 98% adoption), JPMorgan Connect Coach (phased rollout), Wells Fargo Google Agentspace (2,000 employees)

_research.whats_new: First end-to-end meeting workflow (prep + transcription + follow-up) at wirehouse scale. Salesforce + Zoom integration revealed. 1,500 beta users with fastest adoption rate. Plan My Day + conversational CRM capabilities.

~45 min prep time reduced to minutes

_editor_notes: v3 rewritten with fresh multi-source research (session 36). Corrected from 23,000 to 15,000 per verified press release. Added Salesforce+Zoom, 1,500 beta users, Plan My Day.
